technical-writer.source: we added a new /webhooks endpoint. it posts events on order.created. retry is 3 times with exponential backoff. signed with HMAC sha256.

startup-validator.pitch: A subscription service that ships a curated box of ingredients plus a 15-minute recipe to time-starved professionals who want to cook at home.

sql-optimizer.query: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE u.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY u.name ORDER BY COUNT(o.id) DESC;
